*[[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]] [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]]<ref name="Amedda note">''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' establishes that Order 4 stated that if the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] was incapacitated, the command of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] would temporarily fall to the [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], a position held at the [[Time/Legends|time]] by [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]], according to {{DB|character|masamedda|Amedda, Mas}}.</ref>
}}
{{Quote|Cor'ika, we've got a hundred and fifty shabla contingency rules, everything from arresting the Chancellor if he goes gaga to reducing key allied worlds to slag if they switch sides…|RC-3222, to RC-5108/8843 and Jedi General Etain Tur-Mukan|<ref name="Order 66">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''</ref>}}
'''Order 4''' was one of the [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|150 contingency orders]] that the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] were trained to execute for a variety of emergency situations during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Order 4 stated that if the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] was incapacitated, the command of the Grand Army would temporarily fall to the [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] until a successor was appointed.

==Description==
{{Quote|In the event of the Supreme Commander (Chancellor) being incapacitated, overall GAR command shall fall to the vice chair of the Senate until a successor is appointed or an alternative authority identified as outlined in Section 6 (iv).|Order 4|<ref name="TC" />}}
Order 4 was the fourth of [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|150 contingency orders]] created by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. All such orders dealt with different emergency scenarios that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] might have faced during the war; the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the Grand Army were trained to carry out Order 4 without delay.<ref name="TC" />

Order 4 specified that if [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]—the [[Supreme Commander (Republic)|Supreme Commander]] of the Grand Army—was incapacitated in such a manner as to prevent him from performing his duties, command of the [[Army/Legends|army]] would temporarily fall to the [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chair]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]],<ref name="TC" /> a position held at the [[Time/Legends|time]] by [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]].<ref name="Amedda note" /> The Vice Chair would be relieved of his command once a new Supreme Chancellor was elected or an alternative Supreme Commander was chosen.<ref name="TC" />

==History==
Between [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">The indirect mention of Order 4 in ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' takes place 94 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] before the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. The mention must have therefore occurred in either 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] or [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref> 995 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Atin Skirata|RC-3222]] indirectly mentioned Order 4, along with the rest of the Grand Army's 150 contingency orders, to squadmate [[Corr Skirata|RC-5108/8843]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] during a conversation at the Republic's [[Special Operations Brigade Headquarters]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Order 66" />

==Behind the scenes==
Order 4 was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'', the third novel in the ''[[Republic Commando]]'' series, written by [[Karen Traviss]] and published in [[2007]].<ref name="TC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Imo}}
